\subsection{The two tracks live: 2026 as it speaks}\label{sec:twotracklive}
The pre-registered A-vs-B study of Appendix~D, running on the real tournament: after each match the observed shot performance ($\lambda_{\mathrm{obs}}$, Appendix~D.2) updates Track~B's ratings (k=50, locked), while Track~A re-conditions on results alone. 35 match(es) processed so far.

The three champion tracks are tabulated in Table~\ref{tab:champ} (Frozen / Track~A / Track~B / Market) and their realized paths are Figure~\ref{fig:trajectory}; the learning-track Elo drift that distinguishes Track~B is folded into the divergence table, Table~\ref{tab:live_divergence}.
